source_metadata.title: 2025/06/19 EDSI
source_metadata.description:
Thursday, 19 June 2025 | Economic Development, Science and Innovation Committee

2025/26 Estimates for Vote Business, Science and Innovation (excluding appropriations related to the Health Research Fund and New Zealand Trade and Enterprise)

Hearing of evidence:

Minister for Small Business and Manufacturing
	Hon Chris Penk

Ministry of Business, Innovation and Employment
	Carolyn Tremain, Chief Executive
	Paul Stocks, Deputy Secretary
	Ross Van Der Schyff, General Manager
	Andrew Hume, General Manager

Minister of Science, Innovation and Technology
	Hon Dr Shane Reti

Ministry of Business, Innovation and Employment
	Carolyn Tremain, Chief Executive
	Iain Cossar, Programme Director, Science and Science System Reforms
	Robyn Henderson, General Manager, Science and Space
	Dean Ford, General Manager, Technology and Innovation
	Michael Bird, General Manager, Entity Performance and Investment
	Danette Olsen, General Manager, Science System Investment and Performance
